text_block_list.name: Young Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, Brian. The doctor says I can't run with you for a while.

text_block_list.name: Young Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Young Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But there are lots of other people you can race with. So don't worry
about me—go have fun.

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Brian... You're too fast!

text_block_list.name: Young Brian
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna run even faster next time. So let's do another lap.

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
G-gimme a break! You might be having fun 'cause you're winning, but
I'm not!

text_block_list.name: Young Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... You're too fast... I... I hate you!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
U-um... Brian, do you wanna try racing lessons? I bet there are lots of
fast runners there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Several years later, in racing class...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Racing Instructor A
text_block_list.text:
That Narita Brian runs very well. I heard she hasn't been able to settle
anywhere, though.

text_block_list.name: Racing Instructor B
text_block_list.text:
Huh, I can't imagine why. One look at her talent and anyone would be
sorry to miss out on having her.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: I... quit... This sucks. Why's such a fast kid here, anyway?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: (Not again! Why don't you try harder? This is a race! But you just...)

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: I caaan't... Ugh, this is hopeless, no matter how hard I try.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'm leaving after today.

text_block_list.name: Racing Instructor A
text_block_list.text:
B-but why?! I'm sure our class was much better than your last! Our
track is near professional level—you can't find a higher quality
experience elsewhere!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Forget it. This place isn't a challenge anymore... It's pointless when
everyone else has lost their drive to win.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: There you are, Brian.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Sis.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Come to Tracen Academy. That's where you'll find real racing. It may
just satisfy that hunger of yours.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: And they're off! First out of the gate is number six!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Number eight, Narita Brian, is waiting for the perfect opportunity to
break ahead! But number six's lead keeps growing!

text_block_list.name: Number Six Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Haaagh!

text_block_list.name: Number Six Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Wha...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: (Is it really happening here too?)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
No matter where I go, no matter who I challenge, it's always the same.
I'm left feeling hungrier than before.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I guess there's no point in staying here...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no better way to collect your thoughts than a stroll, so I go to
the riverside for some contemplation.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text: You're really going to do this?

text_block_list.name: Senior Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I never want to fail like that again. That's why...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the senior student who raced against Narita Brian. I suppose this is
one of her training spots.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Excuse me. May I have a word?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I didn't mean to take you by surprise. I'm Biwa Hayahide,
Narita Brian's sister.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I've heard stories about your many stubborn attempts to speak with
her. So when I saw you here, I had to come talk to you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: There's no need to be nervous. I'd just like a few minutes of your time.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Phew. Time for a cooldown. Would you write down my latest time with the blue pen?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Before I know it, I'm helping Biwa Hayahide with her training.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. This will make excellent data. That wind sprint you
suggested was effective as well. I'm always looking for ways to
improve.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
More importantly, you kept me company until this late hour, meaning
you put your trainees first... Yes, I think you'll do well.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Shall we move on to the main topic of discussion?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Forgive me. I wanted to test you. According to my hypothesis, one's
attitude toward training also expresses who they are as a person.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm well aware of my discourtesy, but I simply had to know for
sure—whether or not I can place my hopes in you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I would like to ask that you accompany Narita Brian to my debut race.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You see, I heard a concerning rumor making the rounds. If it's true, I
want her to see a real race...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Before she leaves the academy for good.
